jobDescription: Junior Full Stack Developer. We are looking for a motivated entry-level Full Stack Developer. Requirements: Proficiency in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and React. Experience with Node.js, Express, and REST APIs. Familiarity with MongoDB or any NoSQL database. Understanding of Git and version control.
